meta.title: Slide Presentation App
meta.description: Representative deck for screenshots (no external assets)

content.title: Slide Presentation App
content.subtitle:
Data-driven slides defined in JSON
React + Reveal.js + Tauri

notes.speakerNotes: This deck is defined entirely in JSON. Layout, theme, speaker notes, and audio narration are all described in a single file.
summary: Layout / theme / notes / audio in one place
Ideal for AI generation and localization

content.title: layout: center (variant: section)
content.body:
A large title and body text for section breaks or summaries.
You can also place a GitHub link.

steps.title: Render by layout
steps.description: Rendered automatically based on the layout field

steps.title: Apply a theme
steps.description: Specify colors, fonts, and custom CSS in JSON

steps.title: Present
steps.description: Open the presenter view in a separate window

tiles.title: Data-driven
tiles.description:
Slides are defined in JSON.
Reorder or edit by changing data only.

tiles.title: 5 layouts
tiles.description:
center / content / two-column /
bleed / custom are provided.

tiles.title: Add-ons
tiles.description:
Register custom components at runtime
via bundled add-ons.

left.heading: Left column
paragraphs: Lay content out side by side to compare or map items. HTML tags are supported.

right.accentText: → Place a code block or titledBulletList in the right column

content.title: layout: bleed — full-width two-column
content.titleDescription: Title and commands on the left, any component on the right

props.title: Terminal
props.logText:
$ npm run tauri:dev
> Compiling app...
✓ Ready on http://localhost:1420
$ open presentation
✓ 5 slides loaded

props.title: layout: custom
props.logText:
$ slide-presentation-app
> layout: "custom" renders a component
> full-screen with no wrapper
✓ done

content.title: Wrap-up
content.subtitle: Just write JSON — and it's ready to present
